Data and Code

### Fostering Fairness
[Code](https://github.com/bradyearley/Fostering-Fairness)

### Necessity in Free Exercise
[Data and Code](https://github.com/bradyearley/Necessity-in-Free-Exercise)

### Data-Driven Accommodations
[Code](https://github.com/bradyearley/data_driven_accommodations)
